PythonStandards.entry: We use PEP8 and type hints everywhere.

PythonConventions.entry: Make sure to follow PEP8 for all python code.

TempProjectStatus.entry: The staging server for Repo X is currently down due to DB scaling.

API_Protocol.entry: Always prioritize gRPC for internal communications.

DatabaseSchemaRules_Task124.entry: Primary keys should be UUID v4 everywhere.

DatabaseSchemaRules_Task130.entry: When creating tables, UUIDs should be the default ID type.

GlobalGitStrategy.entry: Git rebase is strictly preferred over merge commits for this repository.
